chapters.title: Chapter 1
sections: Setup: Chapter 1: Hành Trình Linh Đăng — Fantasy (Luyện Thể→Nguyên Anh, medium pace) scene 1. A restless wind sketches outlines across the stage, pulsing with unnamed intent. Momentum builds with steady strikes, touching on trade, training, and whispers of power. Focus threads the narrative through giữ lửa linh đạo.

Escalation: Tension coils with slow heat, daring the players to stretch further than comfort allows. A layered escalation now blends character, conflict, and cosmic stakes into a single burn.  Focus threads the narrative through giữ lửa linh đạo.
chapters.cliffhanger: Cliffhanger: The air crystalizes, freezing a single question in the throat that will not be answered yet. The cliff edges toward a revelation that promises both danger and reward. Focus threads the narrative through giữ lửa linh đạo.
